swiftPackagePins.purpose: SQLCipher binary framework used by the vendored GRDB SQLCipher build.
swiftPackagePins.risk: Cryptographic database dependency. Updates require database-open, migration, backup/restore, and data-health verification.

vendoredDependencies.name: GRDB.swift
vendoredDependencies.purpose: SQLite access layer patched for SQLCipher-backed local storage.
vendoredDependencies.risk: Database persistence dependency. Updates require vendor drift verification, package tests, app CI tests, migration checks, and backup/restore drills.
